templates.name: Email Verification
templates.description: A simple but elevated verification email for account creation and email changes.
templates.useCase: Verify a new user email address with a polished account activation flow.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Magic Login Link
templates.description: A sleek magic-link email with expiry and request metadata.
templates.useCase: Send a passwordless login link with strong security context.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: New Device Login
templates.description: A security notification with crisp metadata and a fast account-review action.
templates.useCase: Alert users when their account is accessed from a new device.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Password Reset Request
templates.description: A premium password reset email with a direct action and security context.
templates.useCase: Help users reset a password with clear account safety messaging.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Two-factor Code
templates.description: A focused verification email with a large code treatment and minimal distractions.
templates.useCase: Send a short-lived 2FA or OTP code in a clear, high-contrast format.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Invoice Ready
templates.description: A sharp invoice email designed for SaaS, services, and subscription billing.
templates.useCase: Send customers a premium invoice notice with direct access to billing details.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Payment Failed
templates.description: A billing recovery email with one clear payment update action.
templates.useCase: Notify a customer that a payment failed and prompt them to update payment details.

templates.name: Payment Method Expiring
templates.description: A proactive billing email with urgency, but without alarmist copy.
templates.useCase: Prompt customers to update an expiring payment method before renewal fails.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Plan Upgrade Confirmation
templates.description: A premium upgrade confirmation with plan clarity and immediate next steps.
templates.useCase: Confirm a successful plan upgrade and point customers to newly available capabilities.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Refund Processed
templates.description: A calm refund confirmation email with premium customer-care positioning.
templates.useCase: Confirm a refund with clear timing expectations and support access.

templates.name: Subscription Renewal Reminder
templates.description: A polished renewal notice that reduces billing surprise and support load.
templates.useCase: Remind subscribers about an upcoming renewal with transparent billing details.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Abandoned Checkout
templates.description: A conversion-oriented checkout recovery email that stays simple and brand-safe.
templates.useCase: Recover a checkout with restrained urgency and a premium product reminder.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Delivery Confirmation
templates.description: A polished delivery confirmation that closes the loop without sounding generic.
templates.useCase: Confirm delivery and direct customers to support or order details if needed.

templates.name: Order Confirmation
templates.description: A premium commerce confirmation email for product, ticket, or digital purchases.
templates.useCase: Confirm a purchase with strong order summary hierarchy and a clear receipt link.

templates.name: Return Approved
templates.description: A customer-care return email with clear logistics and a premium support tone.
templates.useCase: Approve a return request with next steps, deadline, and label access.

templates.name: Shipping Update
templates.description: A refined shipping email with carrier metadata and tracking as the primary action.
templates.useCase: Notify customers when a shipment has been handed to a carrier.

templates.name: Approval Request
templates.description: A polished workflow email for approvals, reviews, and internal controls.
templates.useCase: Send approval requests with due dates, requester context, and a direct review action.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Comment Mention
templates.description: A clean collaboration email with context, quote, and one reply action.
templates.useCase: Notify users when they are mentioned in a comment or collaborative thread.
templates.author: TemplateForge

templates.name: Incident Resolved
templates.description: A status-update email that feels calm, credible, and operationally mature.
templates.useCase: Send customers a concise incident resolution notice with status and postmortem access.

templates.name: Integration Disconnected
templates.description: A high-signal integration alert that gives teams the fastest recovery path.
templates.useCase: Alert workspace owners when an integration needs reconnection.

templates.name: Report Ready
templates.description: A premium completion email for exports, analytics, and generated documents.
templates.useCase: Notify customers when a generated report, export, or analysis is ready.

templates.name: Onboarding Checklist
templates.description: A focused progress email that makes the remaining setup path feel manageable.

templates.name: Product Tour Follow-up
templates.description: A crisp lifecycle email that turns a guided tour into product adoption.

templates.name: Team Member Added
templates.description: A refined team activity email with account governance and role visibility.

templates.name: Trial Started

templates.name: Welcome account
templates.description: A clean onboarding email for a newly created workspace or account.
